title: test_can_hear command
description: Test if any of the given entities are within earshot. Returns SUCCESS if at least one is heard.
markdownDescription: Test if any of the given entities are within *earshot*. Returns `SUCCESS` if at least one is heard.

prefixItems.title: test_can_hear command
prefixItems.description: Test if any of the given entities are within earshot.

entities.title: Entities to Test
entities.description: List of entity IDs or aliases to test for hearing.

out_bb_key.title: Output Blackboard Key
out_bb_key.description: If set, the first heard entity is written to this blackboard key.
out_bb_key.markdownDescription: If set, the first heard entity is written to this *blackboard key*.
